name: yukishell-desktop
description: A cross-platform desktop terminal for YukiShell.
author: Yukino Labs

scripts.dev: npm run build:assets && npm run build:core && electron .
scripts.pack: npm run build:assets && npm run build:core && npm run build:python && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:assets && npm run build:core && npm run build:python && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:assets && npm run build:core && npm run build:python && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:assets && npm run build:core && npm run build:python && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:assets && npm run build:python && npm run prepare:resources && electron-builder --win

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: YukiShell uses the camera for visual tutor and microchip scanning commands.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: YukiShell uses the microphone for voice command transcription.
